arguments.argument: I strongly defend the value of Justice/Equality/Freedom/Respect, which emphasizes the importance of fairness, equality, and the well-being of all individuals. arguments.argument: Moreover, I would argue that the current approach of maintaining rigorous standards (Action 1) can be seen as a form of systemic injustice in itself.
